name: Lumber Mill
notes: Buildable at any base with a Forest-adjacent tile — no longer exclusive to Treehouse (see game-design/02-bases-and-buildings.md and 03-resources.md). Treehouse's own siteTerrain exception (placing directly on Forest instead of Plains) is authored on Treehouse's BaseDef/terrainException, not here — this definition's siteTerrain/adjacentTerrainRequired covers the generic (non-Treehouse) placement case. Ticks automatically every 5s resource tick, no player input (Resource category). HP regen follows the global rule (5% of current max HP per 5s tick), not a per-building field.
